description.ko: 견고한 기하학적 형태가 파편과 글리치의 디지털 풍경으로 격렬하게 해체되는 통제된 카오스에 대한 연구입니다.
description.en: A study in controlled chaos where a solid geometric form is violently dismantled into a digital landscape of fragments and glitches.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian cube by KURO-X, undergoing a violent yet mathematically recursive geometric deconstruction. The structure fractures into thousands of sharp #808080 and #C0C0C0 polygonal shards and pixel-sorted fragments, suspended in a clinical #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, scanlines, and intense chromatic aberration cut through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on the fragmented surfaces. 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, capturing precise mathematical chaos and shifting planes of reality.
